name: polymarket-whale-copier
description: Automatically copy trade winning Polymarket wallets. Track any wallet, mirror their bets, profit from their alpha.
author: OpenClaw
features: Copy any wallet by pasting their address
Fixed USDC bet size per trade
Risk controls: min/max USDC limits + slippage guard
BUY-only mode to avoid copying sells
Full trade logging to CSV file
HTTP control API for AI agent integration

endpoints.GET /status: Bot state, balance, trade counts, active config
endpoints.PATCH /config: Update fixed_usdc, poll_interval, target_wallet, etc. live
